title: Rolson 51 pc Screwdriver & Bit Set (Chrome Vanadium Steel, Square, Hex, Pozidriv, Tri-winged, Stainless Steel Tweezers)
features: Soft rubber screwdriver handle and 50pc x 25mm screwdriver bits manufactured from CrV
includes Slot 3, 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5, 6, 6, 6.5, 7, 8mm. Cross point PH0, PH1, PH1, PH2, PH2, PH2, PH2, PH3, PZ0, PZ1, PZ2, PZ2, PZ3, PZ3
Star T8, T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30, T40. Hex 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 5.5, 6mm. Square 0, 1, 2, 3. Spanner bits 4, 6, 8. Tri winged 1, 2, 3
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring you new innovative products, all at the very best possible margins and this year is no different. We have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet your appetite, together with a host of new in-store packaging and material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal! The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to package our new and existing lines. We bring product combinations that offer originality and a unique offering.
